title: Power Generating Unit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Pgu.png|thumb|A PGU]]
A '''Power Generating Unit (PGU)''' was often used around [[Starship/Legends|starship]] maintenance facilities.

==History==
They were highly explosive when hit by a stray [[Laser/Legends|laser]], and if others were in the vicinity, the effects were devastating.

==Behind the scenes==
These units play the role of the frequent 'exploding barrel' element of action games.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces Remaster]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-02-15 -->''[[Dark Forces Manual: Coded Transmissions]]''
